title: Moving In | #shorts
full_text: when I I graduate what what is happening what is happening between the two of you and why are you always when I graduate it is still my room to live in no of course of course wait no I haven't had the room in years he got it while I was listen to me listen to me you belong to another family you get married you go live with the husband and his parents I don't even know if I want to get married I'm planning on moving back in when I graduate no she understand that is not an option that is not an option thank you what if I pay rent no um no
